message:
feat(engine): add closure/lexical-scope model and deterministic Promise/microtask model for ES2020 semantics

Introduces two new runtime subsystems required for correct ES2020
execution:

closure_model.rs (1368 lines):
- Scope chains with push/pop lifecycle matching block entry/exit
- Variable hoisting (var, function) to nearest function/global scope
- Block-scoped bindings (let, const) with Temporal Dead Zone enforcement
- Closure capture: snapshot of free-variable references at function
  creation time
- IFC label propagation on every binding and capture
- Uses BTreeMap for deterministic iteration across replays

promise_model.rs (2101 lines):
- Promise state machine: Pending → Fulfilled | Rejected (immutable once
  settled)
- Microtask queue with strict FIFO ordering, drains completely before
  the next macrotask
- Virtual clock for deterministic timer operations across runs,
  execution lanes, and replays
- IFC label propagation on every Promise value
- Witness emission for every microtask enqueue/dequeue for replay
  fidelity
- Integration with ClosureHandle for then/catch/finally callbacks

lib.rs: adds module declarations for closure_model and promise_model in
alphabetical order, with minor re-sorting of adjacent module entries.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
